DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash for the current version of a feature.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Helps developers track which version of a feature is being used, ensuring players get the latest updates.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Records the timestamp when a dynamic string feature is flipped or changed.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Allows players to experience timely updates and changes in features based on when they were last modified.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Holds a fast-access string that indicates the Git hash for a feature's version.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance by quickly identifying the version of a feature, enhancing the player experience with smoother updates.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Maintains a fast-access timestamp for when a feature was last flipped or updated.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Ensures players receive the most recent changes quickly, improving gameplay and feature responsiveness.
